title: It's Like This Every Day for Her

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm done with my cooldown! Time to head to my
part-time job!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing our scheduled training, Ines Fujin
disappears like the wind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I settle down to review the data I collected today.
As I weigh up which training routine would be
best for Ines to do next...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Nature, could I ask you to accompany me for
another three laps?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you just don't get tired, do you, Ikuno? All
right! Let's do a little extra training together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other Umamusume, having finished their
usual training, have already started on some
additional training of their own volition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is far from an uncommon sight here at Tracen
Academy, but you'd be hard-pressed to find Ines
Fujin among their number.
choice_data_list: She's going to fall behind at this rate...
She's going to fall behind at this rate...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's the way, Bright! Excellent form! You've
got a good center of balance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Yes, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume calmly catching her breath is
Mejiro Bright, another member of the prestigious
Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my. All those days I spent worrying over my
progress seem like a distant memory now. You
solve my problems so effortlessly, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Training isn't just about quantity—quality plays a
major part! You have to train with a goal in mind!
...Though I'm just repeating what Grandmother
told me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's spot on. Rather than lamenting the lack of
time Ines Fujin spends training, I need to focus on
raising the quality of her training sessions.
choice_data_list: I'd better do some more studying myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Recently, one of the senior trainers recommended
me some bookstores and sporting shops, so I
decide to spend the week scouring them for
useful reference materials.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, when I make it to the book shop in
question, it turns out to be huge! Just finding the
right section seems like it's going to be tough.

text_block_list.name: Shop Clerk
text_block_list.text:
You're looking for racing magazines? You'll find
them on the second floor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems I'm not the only one who's come here
looking lost. I turn around to thank the helpful
clerk, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Please follow me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If there's anything in particular you're looking for,
feel free to ask a member of our staff!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Thanks for waiting! Here's your ramen!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, about our training regimen for
tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whoa! What's wrong?! I'm right here!
choice_data_list: I've been seeing you everywhere this week...
I've been seeing you everywhere this week...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Now that you mention it, we have been bumping
into each other a lot. Even at my one-off
part-time gigs.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I'd prefer them all to be long-term,
since it's hard to know when they'll post openings
for one-off jobs.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But with long-term jobs, I can only take them on
if they have a lot of flexibility, you know?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'd be in a bind if my shifts overlapped
with a race that I absolutely wanted to enter,
right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So my only long-term jobs right now are the
ramen shop, convenience store, and flyer-posting
gig. I owe my managers big time for always letting
me alter my schedule on short notice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So she juggles those three jobs in addition to
various short-term ones... Surprised by how hectic
her life must be, worry creeps into my mind.
choice_data_list: By the way, how are your studies going?
By the way, how are your studies going?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that face! I bet you think I've been failing my
classes, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Listen here! I never slack off! That goes for racing, work, and study!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If you're that concerned, then how about I prove
it to you? I make a pretty dependable classmate,
if I do say so myself.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
These notes are straight up god-like, Ines! No
cap! You high-key deserve an award or
something!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume I see before me are Daitaku
Helios and Mejiro Palmer, two of Ines Fujin's
classmates.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, don't exaggerate! All I did was lend you
my notebook. I'm glad it helped, though. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It was totes easy to follow, for real! I, like, finally
understand the stuff written on the math
worksheets!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Class doesn't start for another five minutes, Ines.
And the teacher's not even here yet, so why not
take it easy?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I've got to cram in as much study as I can. I
can't risk failing and having to deal with make-up
exams.

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that all you're having for lunch, Ines? And
why are you wearing your tracksuit?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yep! But I had a big breakfast! The track is
normally pretty empty during lunch break, so I
thought I'd take the chance to work on my form!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text: Welcome!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After watching Ines Fujin go about her day,
there's something I've realized.
choice_data_list: (She always gives it everything she has.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh? Trainer, I didn't realize you still wanted to
shadow me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh, I'm just teasing.
Boss, one order of deluxe ramen!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text: Coming right up!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Ah—that's not on the house, by the way. You
have to pay for it yourself.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
Haha, so you're Fu's trainer! I see she's really got
you under her thumb!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, well and truly!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, that's our Fu for you!
By the way...

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to hear your thoughts on Fu's running.
Think she's got the stuff to win in the Twinkle
Series?

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
The thing is, I'm actually good friends with her
mom. She told me that Fu has had to put up with
a lot.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
Always helping with the housework and looking
after her sisters while her mom was in the hospital.
Right up through middle school, everything she
did was for her family.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
Even now, she works part-time jobs so that she
can send money back home to help with the
family finances and pay for her sisters'
after-school lessons.
choice_data_list: Yes, I've noticed how hard she works...

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
Haha, she's something else, isn't she? I wonder
how she's able to push herself like that.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
It wouldn't hurt her to let up a little bit. But no,
even for part-time jobs, she learns the fastest and
works the hardest.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
She's got it tougher than other students, but she
enjoys every day to the fullest. Maybe it's
because she's in a place where she can chase her
dream.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
So... What's your expert opinion? Think she can
handle the Twinkle Series?

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text: Thanks for your patronage!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I leave the ramen shop and take a moment for
myself. The streets are alive with the sounds of
swift footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, let's hang out a bit more before heading
home! I wanna hit up some karaoke!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
You're still not tired?! Okay, but only thirty
minutes.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Great stuff today, Boss! See you next time!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! I just wrapped things up at the ramen
shop.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not done for the day yet. Next, I've got a
shift at the convenience store!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yep. I took as many shifts as I could pack in
today.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Starting tomorrow, I want to put all my focus into
training for my debut race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that smile on her face, my desire to work
hard and help her reach her potential increases
tenfold.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide that the least I can do is carry her school
bag as I accompany her to the convenience store.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, are you sure you're okay with that? It's
pretty heavy, right?
choice_data_list: Don't worry. I want to carry it for you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Well, if you insist...

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you got a shift today too, Ines?
Hey, who is—ohh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The girl looking me up and down is likely one of
Ines Fujin's coworkers. As her trainer, I decide it's
best to greet the girl with a polite nod.
choice_data_list: Hello. Thank you for looking out for Ines.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, so you're into the gracious older type, huh,
Ines? Don't let me get in your way, then!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, ya know? Having someone carry your bag
all the way to work? You may as well be all over
each other!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Ohh, I see now. Yeah, you're spot on. This here
is my one-and-only partner who brings me
happiness.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Or to put it in clearer terms, my trainer!
But you already knew that. Now stop messing
around already!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I never would have imagined. Well,
whatever. See you during your shift.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah.
Hey, hurry up, Trainer! I'll be late if you don't pick
up the pace!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin dashes off toward the convenience
store, and I hurry after her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My heavy footsteps echo some distance behind
hers. I look forward to the day we can truly walk
side by side.
